mapper.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXP_RQST ER WHERE ER.ER_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND ER.ER_USE_YN = 'Y' AND ER.ER_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CSTM_REQ', 'CSTM_ACPT', 'CSTM_INPRG' ) ) AS export_progress_cnt
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMP_RQST IR WHERE IR.IR_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND IR.IR_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IR.IR_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CSTM_REQ', 'CSTM_ACPT', 'CSTM_INPRG' ) ) AS import_progress_cnt
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMP_ARRV_NTC IAN WHERE IAN.IAN_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND NVL(IAN.IAN_SEND_STTS_CD, 'TRC_NTC_NSENT') IN ( 'TRC_NTC_NSENT' ) ) AS arrival_notice_cnt
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BROKER_CHARGE BC WHERE BC.BC_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND BC.BC_STATUS_CD IN ( 'BC_CHARGED', 'BC_PAY_READY' ) ) AS tax_wait_cnt
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUPP_RQST SR JOIN EXP_RQST ER ON ER.ER_NO = SR.SR_REF_NO WHERE SR.RECEIVER_ID = #{owrId} AND SR.RECEIVER_TY_CD = 'OWNER' AND SR.SR_STATUS_CD = 'REQ' AND SR.SR_REF_BIZ_CD IN ( 'EXPORT', 'EXP_RQST', 'CUSTOMS_EXPORT' ) AND ER.ER_USE_YN = 'Y' ) AS export_supp_cnt
, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUPP_RQST SR JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = SR.SR_REF_NO WHERE SR.RECEIVER_ID = #{owrId} AND SR.RECEIVER_TY_CD = 'OWNER' AND SR.SR_STATUS_CD = 'REQ' AND SR.SR_REF_BIZ_CD IN ( 'IMPORT', 'IMP_RQST', 'CUSTOMS_IMPORT' ) AND IR.IR_USE_YN = 'Y' ) AS import_supp_cnt FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'EXPORT' AS biz_type , ER.ER_NO AS req_no , NVL(ER.ER_ONER_NM, ER.ER_OWR_ID) AS trader_nm , ER.ER_STATUS_CD AS status_cd , NVL(CC.CC_NM, ER.ER_STATUS_CD) AS status_nm , NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT) AS req_dt , '/owner/export/detail.do/' || ER.ER_NO AS detail_url , '조회' AS button_text , 'mini mini-view' AS button_class , CASE WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_REQ' THEN 'badge badge-wait' WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_ACPT' THEN 'badge badge-ok' WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_INPRG' THEN 'badge badge-new' ELSE 'badge badge-new' END AS badge_class FROM EXP_RQST ER LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CC ON CC.CC_CD = ER.ER_STATUS_CD AND CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'CSTM_STATUS' AND CC.CC_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE ER.ER_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND ER.ER_USE_YN = 'Y' AND ER.ER_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CSTM_REQ', 'CSTM_ACPT', 'CSTM_INPRG' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_INPRG' THEN 1 WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_ACPT' THEN 2 WHEN ER.ER_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_REQ' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END , NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'IMPORT' AS biz_type , IR.IR_NO AS req_no , NVL(IR.IR_BL_AWB_NO, IR.IR_NO) AS trader_nm , IR.IR_STATUS_CD AS status_cd , NVL(CC.CC_NM, IR.IR_STATUS_CD) AS status_nm , NVL(IR.IR_DT, IR.IR_REGIST_DT) AS req_dt , '/owner/import/detail.do/' || IR.IR_NO AS detail_url , '조회' AS button_text , 'mini mini-view' AS button_class , CASE WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_REQ' THEN 'badge badge-wait' WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_ACPT' THEN 'badge badge-ok' WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_INPRG' THEN 'badge badge-new' ELSE 'badge badge-new' END AS badge_class FROM IMP_RQST IR LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CC ON CC.CC_CD = IR.IR_STATUS_CD AND CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'CSTM_STATUS' AND CC.CC_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE IR.IR_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND IR.IR_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IR.IR_STATUS_CD IN ( 'CSTM_REQ', 'CSTM_ACPT', 'CSTM_INPRG' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_INPRG' THEN 1 WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_ACPT' THEN 2 WHEN IR.IR_STATUS_CD = 'CSTM_REQ' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END , NVL(IR.IR_DT, IR.IR_REGIST_DT) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'EXPORT' AS biz_type , ER.ER_NO AS req_no , NVL(SR.SR_REQ_CN, '추가 서류 제출 요청') AS supp_title , NVL(B.BROKER_OFFICE_NM, NVL(B.BROKER_NM, SR.SENDER_ID)) AS requester_nm , SR.SR_STATUS_CD AS status_cd , NVL(CC.CC_NM, SR.SR_STATUS_CD) AS status_nm , SR.SR_REQ_DT AS req_dt , '/owner/export/detail.do/' || ER.ER_NO AS detail_url , '업로드' AS button_text , 'mini mini-sup' AS button_class , CASE WHEN SR.SR_DUE_DT IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(SR.SR_DUE_DT) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= 1 THEN 'urgent' ELSE 'warn' END AS dday_class FROM SUPP_RQST SR JOIN EXP_RQST ER ON ER.ER_NO = SR.SR_REF_NO LEFT JOIN BROKER B ON B.BROKER_ID = SR.SENDER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CC ON CC.CC_CD = SR.SR_STATUS_CD AND CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'SUPP_STATUS' AND CC.CC_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE SR.RECEIVER_ID = #{owrId} AND SR.RECEIVER_TY_CD = 'OWNER' AND SR.SR_STATUS_CD = 'REQ' AND SR.SR_REF_BIZ_CD IN ( 'EXPORT', 'EXP_RQST', 'CUSTOMS_EXPORT' ) AND ER.ER_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(SR.SR_DUE_DT, SR.SR_REQ_DT) ASC , SR.SR_REQ_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'IMPORT' AS biz_type , IR.IR_NO AS req_no , NVL(SR.SR_REQ_CN, '추가 서류 제출 요청') AS supp_title , NVL(B.BROKER_OFFICE_NM, NVL(B.BROKER_NM, SR.SENDER_ID)) AS requester_nm , SR.SR_STATUS_CD AS status_cd , NVL(CC.CC_NM, SR.SR_STATUS_CD) AS status_nm , SR.SR_REQ_DT AS req_dt , '/owner/import/detail.do/' || IR.IR_NO AS detail_url , '업로드' AS button_text , 'mini mini-sup' AS button_class , CASE WHEN SR.SR_DUE_DT IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(SR.SR_DUE_DT) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= 1 THEN 'urgent' ELSE 'warn' END AS dday_class FROM SUPP_RQST SR JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = SR.SR_REF_NO LEFT JOIN BROKER B ON B.BROKER_ID = SR.SENDER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE CC ON CC.CC_CD = SR.SR_STATUS_CD AND CC.CC_CCG_ID = 'SUPP_STATUS' AND CC.CC_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE SR.RECEIVER_ID = #{owrId} AND SR.RECEIVER_TY_CD = 'OWNER' AND SR.SR_STATUS_CD = 'REQ' AND SR.SR_REF_BIZ_CD IN ( 'IMPORT', 'IMP_RQST', 'CUSTOMS_IMPORT' ) AND IR.IR_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(SR.SR_DUE_DT, SR.SR_REQ_DT) ASC , SR.SR_REQ_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT N.NOTI_NO AS noti_no , N.NOTI_EVENT_CD AS event_cd , N.NOTI_REF_KEY AS ref_key , N.NOTI_TITLE AS title , N.NOTI_BODY AS body , N.NOTI_LINK_URL AS link_url , N.NOTI_READ_YN AS read_yn , N.NOTI_SEND_DT AS send_dt
, CASE WHEN (SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) * 24 * 60 < 1 THEN '방금 전' WHEN (SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) * 24 < 1 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) * 24 * 60) || '분 전' WHEN (SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) < 1 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) * 24) || '시간 전' WHEN (SYSDATE - N.NOTI_SEND_DT) < 2 THEN '어제' ELSE TO_CHAR(N.NOTI_SEND_DT, 'MM/DD') END AS time_text
, CASE WHEN N.NOTI_READ_YN = 'N' THEN 'feed-dot-success' ELSE '' END AS dot_class
FROM NOTIFICATION N WHERE N.NOTI_RECEIVER_ID = #{owrId} AND N.NOTI_SEND_STATUS = 'SENT' ORDER BY N.NOTI_SEND_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
